promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next strong bounded ultra-family sims reduction after the terrain-sign boundary pass and because the parent batch already isolates the macro shell seam cleanly.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the macro composite shell, the local-only evidence-admission split, the hidden Axis12 sequence seam, the branch-specific scale split, the Se-centered Stage16 packet, and the raw-order expansion boundary to ultra4.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The sims evidence-boundary batch was used for the nearest catalog/evidence separation packet, the Stage16 boundary batch was used for the nearest local-only admission split and next-family boundary pattern, and the terrain-sign boundary batch was used for the nearest adjacent-family nonmerge pattern.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred to the next bounded step because this pass ends at the ultra4 expansion boundary instead of absorbing the next family.
Not selected because this thread prefers existing intake artifacts over fresh raw-source rereads unless a parent batch proves insufficient.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent ultra2 macro-family batch plus the existing sims evidence-boundary, Stage16 boundary, and terrain boundary A2-mid anchors were sufficient to isolate the reusable macro-shell, hidden-scope, branch-scale, and next-family-boundary packets for this pass.

candidate_items.name: ULTRA2_MACRO_COMPOSITE_SHELL_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's clearest macro family-identity claim before its internal branches are interpreted separately.

candidate_items.name: LOCAL_ULTRA2_SIM_ID_WITHOUT_REPOTOP_ADMISSION_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the cleanest compression of the parent batch's main evidence contradiction.

candidate_items.name: AXIS12_HIDDEN_SEQUENCE_SCOPE_BEYOND_SEQS_FIELD_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's sharpest internal contradiction in a smaller reusable packet.

candidate_items.name: BRANCH_SPECIFIC_SCALE_AND_SEMANTIC_SPLIT_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's clearest anti-flattening rule across the bundled branches.

candidate_items.name: ULTRA2_STAGE16_SE_CONCENTRATION_WITHIN_MACRO_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's clearest Stage16-specific packet inside the composite shell.

candidate_items.name: ULTRA4_FULL_STACK_EXPANSION_BOUNDARY_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest next-family boundary packet in the parent batch while keeping ultra4 outside the current bounded family.

quarantined_items.name: CATALOG_PLUS_LOCAL_WRITER_AS_REPOTOP_EVIDENCE_STATUS
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Local writer presence and catalog visibility are both weaker than repo-top admission and would erase the parent's zero-match evidence state.

quarantined_items.name: ONE_MACRO_RESULT_AS_ONE_UNIFORM_BEHAVIOR_CLASS
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: One container is weaker than one behavior class and would erase the Stage16 / Axis0 AB / Axis12 semantic split preserved by the parent batch.

quarantined_items.name: SEQS_FIELD_AS_EXHAUSTIVE_AXIS12_SCOPE_DECLARATION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The stored field is weaker than the actual stored Axis12 branch contents and would erase the hidden-scope seam.

quarantined_items.name: ONE_UNIFORM_ULTRA2_EFFECT_SCALE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly preserves larger Stage16 values, smaller Axis0 AB values, and discrete Axis12 counts rather than one shared scale.

quarantined_items.name: ULTRA4_AS_SAME_BOUNDED_FAMILY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Adjacency and macro similarity are weaker than bounded-family identity and would erase the expansion markers preserved by the parent batch.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the parent batch's strongest reusable ultra2 packets: macro-shell identity, local-only admission split, hidden Axis12 sequence scope, branch-specific scale and semantics split, Se-centered Stage16 concentration, and the ultra4 expansion boundary.

They preserve ultra2 as a contradiction-rich macro bundle without letting catalog visibility, visible seq fields, or raw adjacency flatten it into one clean evidence status or one uniform behavior surface.
They remain small, source-linked, contradiction-preserving, and proposal-side for later ultra-family work.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain evidence-strength overreads, branch-flattening overreads, visible-field overreads, or family-merge overreads rather than clean reusable A2-2 packets.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as warnings, but not to promote them into current law.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after the required control-surface reads already completed earlier in the thread.
Used the sims evidence-boundary, Stage16 boundary, and terrain boundary A2-mid batches as comparison anchors.
No raw core-doc reread was needed for this bounded ultra2 macro hidden-scope contradiction reprocess pass.
